manifest.install: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_water_center_footer` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `title` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '名称', `iclass` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `iconname` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `url` varchar(300) DEFAULT NULL, `indexno` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '序号', `state` int(2) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '状态', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_water_center_menu` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `typeid` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `title` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '名称', `url` varchar(300) DEFAULT NULL, `iconname` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `module` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `moduletype` int(2) DEFAULT NULL, `issys` int(2) DEFAULT '0', `all` int(2) DEFAULT '0', `indexno` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '序号', `state` int(2) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '状态', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_water_center_type` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `title` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '名称', `indexno` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '序号', `state` int(2) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '状态', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_water_live_fans` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `openid` varchar(300) DEFAULT NULL, `nickname` varchar(300) DEFAULT NULL, `headimgurl` varchar(300) DEFAULT NULL, `sex` int(2) DEFAULT '0', `fimg` varchar(300) DEFAULT NULL, `fname` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `fmobile` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `fage` int(11) DEFAULT '18', `fdesc` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `faddress` varchar(300) DEFAULT NULL, `flocation` varchar(300) DEFAULT NULL, `balance` float DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '余额', `signtime` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `sharetime` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `addtime` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `status` int(2) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '身份', `state` int(2) DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
